metadata.description: Marketplace for AI goodies created by Yemi

plugins.name: teams-notifier
plugins.description: Sends completion notifications to Microsoft Teams when tasks are finished

plugins.name: teams-plan-tracker
plugins.description: Automatically posts plans to Teams and threads PR updates as replies. Tracks plan IDs and manages the workflow between plan creation, PR creation, and completion tracking.

plugins.name: send-to-codex
plugins.description: Delegate the current plan and conversation context to GitHub Copilot CLI (agency copilot) in headless mode for autonomous execution.
